name: preset-agent-skills
description: Preset API skills for authentication, workspace discovery, administration, Superset workspace APIs, and security-sensitive workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Authenticate with Preset, administer teams/workspaces, use Superset APIs, and handle sensitive workflows.
interface.longDescription: Markdown skills for agents using the public Preset Management API and workspace Superset APIs. Includes guarded authentication guidance, workspace discovery, admin workflows for memberships, invites, roles, audits, version-aware Superset OpenAPI discovery, dashboard/chart, dataset/database, SQL Lab, import/export, embedding, guest-token, RLS, database-connection, role/permission, and destructive-import guidance.
defaultPrompt: List audit logs for my Preset team
List dashboards in a Preset workspace
Review a Preset SQL execution request
